description: PULSE pipeline Step 2 × Cluster 2 (Batch Logging & File-Level Lineage) — code + structure snapshot.

tables.name: governance.batch_log
tables.purpose: Ingest-level summary log. One row per batch ingestion event.

tables.name: governance.ingest_file_log
tables.purpose: File-level lineage. One row per file per batch, tracking status, row count, checksum.

ingest_dictionary.usage: Source-to-lake column mappings loaded into reference.ingest_dictionary.

type_decisions.usage: Target SQL types per variable for raw-to-staging promotion. Optional.

functions.name: log_batch_ingest
functions.description: Step 2A: create batch_log row and pending ingest_file_log rows per file.

functions.name: ingest_batch
functions.description: Step 2B: loop over pending files, call ingest_one_file(), update lineage, promote to staging, finalize batch.

functions.name: ingest_one_file
functions.description: Strict type-enforced single-file ingestion into raw.<lake_table> with dictionary-based harmonization.

functions.name: get_ingest_dict
functions.description: Load reference.ingest_dictionary and normalize column names to lower case.

functions.name: pick_one
functions.description: Extract a single scalar lake_table value from a vector of candidates.

functions.name: align_df_to_raw_table
functions.description: Defensive table alignment: create table if missing, add missing columns to table or data.frame, reorder to match.

functions.name: promote_to_staging
functions.description: Promote raw.<table> to staging.<table> via SQL CAST using type_decisions. Transactional with rollback on error.

functions.name: run_step2_batch_logging
functions.description: Step 2 wrapper for pipeline runner. Derives source_type from ingest_dictionary, runs logging and ingestion, writes pipeline_step.

scripts.purpose: Human-friendly Step 2 entry: set source_id/source_type, list CSVs, call log_batch_ingest() and ingest_batch().
Pipeline runner wrapper for Step 2 orchestration.
